narrative: Middle East escalation and RBA tightening drive price action as Iran tensions fuel a crude bid — gold higher +1.07%; equities +0.79%; DXY -0.03%; VIX 17.5. AUD/USD firms to 0.7197 after the RBA hiked to 4.35%, creating a -+300bp carry disadvantage for USD. USD/JPY bids to 157.66 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ differential sustains carry despite intervention warnings. Watch RBNZ Rate Decision on May 27.
